name: Mushroom, Pine Nut and Garlic
steps: Add all ingredients in stockpot, bring to the boil then simmer to reduce by half.
Pass the stock and keep the mushrooms.
Reduce the stock further if necessary and season.
Set the leftover mushrooms to be freeze-dried and turned into powder.
Finely chop the garlic, leek, and onion, then sweat them in a little olive oil without coloring.
Remove from heat and blend to a smooth paste.
Using a meat slicer or mandolin, slice the mushroom into 1mm thick slices.
Neatly cut the slices into thin strips resembling spaghetti.
